summary: Parallel review: FAIL (1 critical, 11 warning, 10 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: 🟡 bin/lib/run.mjs:80 — `runGateInline` does not integrate validator parsers; this is the primary `agt run` code path, so "exit 0 + structured failures → FAIL" won't work via `agt run`, only via `agt-harness gate`; integrate parsers before feature completion

🟡 bin/lib/gate.mjs:107 — Format detection logic is private to gate.mjs instead of exported as `detectAndParse` per SPEC; when `runGateInline` needs parsing, this logic will need duplication or extraction
🟡 bin/lib/gate.mjs:1 — `.team/validators.json` config override (SPEC "Done When" requirement) is not implemented in either gate path

🟡 `test/parsers.test.mjs:1` — No integration test feeds all-passing structured output through `cmdGate` and asserts `verdict: "PASS"` with zero findings. Parser unit tests prove each parser returns `[]`, and code traces confirm the verdict pipeline, but the full gate-level happy path has zero automated test coverage.

🟡 `bin/lib/gate.mjs:107` — Detection-parsing-verdict pipeline (L107-121) has no dedicated test coverage for any of the 4 parser paths. All build tasks relied on parser unit tests + code traces in eval files. This integration gap compounds with each parser addition.
🟡 No gate integration test for all-passing JUnit XML through `cmdGate`
🟡 No gate integration test for all-passing TAP output through `cmdGate`
🟡 No gate integration test for all-passing GHA output through `cmdGate`
🟡 No gate integration test for JSON `{"errors": []}` through `cmdGate`
🟡 `effectiveCritical` formula makes all-pass structured output indistinguishable from no-detection — no test pins this

🟡 bin/lib/gate.mjs:125 — `taskId` used in `join(dir, "tasks", taskId, "artifacts")` without path-traversal sanitization. A builder agent could craft `--task "../../foo"` to write artifacts outside `tasks/`. Pre-existing (flagged in prior reviews). Fix: reject `taskId` containing `..` or `/`.
No 🔴 (critical) or 🟡 (warning) findings. All four veto categories checked and passed:
